news.title:
Jefferies maintains Buy on Aavas Financiers with a target of Rs 1,875 as AUM grew 15% YoY to Rs 235bn.
Disbursements rose 16% YoY, GS-3 improved to 1.07%, 31 branches added in 4Q, and P/B at 1.5x FY27E.
news.summary:
Jefferies maintains Buy on Aavas Financiers with a target of Rs 1,875 as AUM grew 15% YoY to Rs 235bn.
Disbursements rose 16% YoY, GS-3 improved to 1.07%, 31 branches added in 4Q, and P/B at 1.5x FY27E.

news.title: Morgan Stanley retains Equal weight rating for Aavas Financiers with a target price of 1,600.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley retains Equal weight rating for Aavas Financiers with a target price of 1,600.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Endurance Tech, cuts target to Rs 2,900 citing demand outlook; Fortis Healthcare aims 22-25% EBITDA margin by FY26.
Jefferies sees 74% upside for Aavas Financiers, targets Rs 1,875; Morgan Stanley gives cautious view, prefers Aptus and Home First Finance.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Endurance Tech, cuts target to Rs 2,900 citing demand outlook; Fortis Healthcare aims 22-25% EBITDA margin by FY26.
Jefferies sees 74% upside for Aavas Financiers, targets Rs 1,875; Morgan Stanley gives cautious view, prefers Aptus and Home First Finance.

news.title:
AAVAS Financiers' AUM rose 15% YoY to INR 235 bn; Q4 disbursement grew 16% YoY.
1+ DPD improved to 3.17%; Gross Stage 3 to 1.07%; credit rating upgraded to AAA.
news.summary:
AAVAS Financiers' AUM rose 15% YoY to INR 235 bn; Q4 disbursement grew 16% YoY.
1+ DPD improved to 3.17%; Gross Stage 3 to 1.07%; credit rating upgraded to AAA.

news.title:
ICRA assigns highest safety rating to Rs.495.6 crore Series A1 PTCs by Aavas Financiers.
Rating reflects lowest credit risk, subject to conditions and documentation review.
news.summary:
ICRA assigns highest safety rating to Rs.495.6 crore Series A1 PTCs by Aavas Financiers.
Rating reflects lowest credit risk, subject to conditions and documentation review.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Aavas Financiers' credit rating at ICRA AA, upgrading outlook to Positive from Stable.
Rating for matured NCDs withdrawn upon full redemption.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Aavas Financiers' credit rating at ICRA AA, upgrading outlook to Positive from Stable.
Rating for matured NCDs withdrawn upon full redemption.

news.title:
ADB commits USD 108 mn to Aavas Financiers for affordable housing loans, focusing on lower-income households and MSMEs in underserved Indian states.
70% of financing supports housing loans, with 50% for women property owners; 30% aids MSMEs to promote entrepreneurship and jobs.
news.summary:
ADB commits USD 108 mn to Aavas Financiers for affordable housing loans, focusing on lower-income households and MSMEs in underserved Indian states.
70% of financing supports housing loans, with 50% for women property owners; 30% aids MSMEs to promote entrepreneurship and jobs.

news.title:
AAVAS Financiers Ltd announces investor/analyst meetings on Feb 19 (Jaipur) and Feb 25 (Mumbai).
Meetings to use publicly available info; investor presentation uploaded on www.aavas.in.
news.summary:
AAVAS Financiers Ltd announces investor/analyst meetings on Feb 19 (Jaipur) and Feb 25 (Mumbai).
Meetings to use publicly available info; investor presentation uploaded on www.aavas.in.

news.title:
Aavas Financiers Ltd held its Q3FY26 earnings call, reporting a 15% YoY growth in AUM to Rs. 222 billion and a 16% YoY net profit increase to Rs. 1.7 billion.
The company raised Rs. 975 crore via NCDs, improved asset quality with GNPA at 1.19%, and plans further branch expansion, targeting 25% disbursement growth in FY27.
news.summary:
Aavas Financiers Ltd held its Q3FY26 earnings call, reporting a 15% YoY growth in AUM to Rs. 222 billion and a 16% YoY net profit increase to Rs. 1.7 billion.
The company raised Rs. 975 crore via NCDs, improved asset quality with GNPA at 1.19%, and plans further branch expansion, targeting 25% disbursement growth in FY27.

news.title:
Aavas Financiers aims for 25% disbursement growth by FY27.
The company is also expanding its branch network during this period.
news.summary:
Aavas Financiers aims for 25% disbursement growth by FY27.
The company is also expanding its branch network during this period.

news.title:
AAVAS Financiers' AUM rose 15% YoY to Rs. 222 bn; PAT up 13% YoY at Rs. 4.74 bn.
Spread improved 40 bps to 5.34%, NIM at 7.82%; stable asset quality with 1+ DPD at 3.8%.
news.summary:
AAVAS Financiers' AUM rose 15% YoY to Rs. 222 bn; PAT up 13% YoY at Rs. 4.74 bn.
Spread improved 40 bps to 5.34%, NIM at 7.82%; stable asset quality with 1+ DPD at 3.8%.

news.title:
Aavas Financiers' Q3 net profit rose to 1.7B INR from 1.46B INR YoY.
Revenue increased to 5.74B INR in Q3, up from 5.12B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Aavas Financiers' Q3 net profit rose to 1.7B INR from 1.46B INR YoY.
Revenue increased to 5.74B INR in Q3, up from 5.12B INR YoY.

news.title:
AAVAS Financiers' board approved Q3 FY25 results: interest income INR 57,382 lakhs, PAT INR 17,005 lakhs.
AFL Prime Lending Rate will be cut by 15 bps from March 1, 2026; NCDs have 100% security cover.
news.summary:
AAVAS Financiers' board approved Q3 FY25 results: interest income INR 57,382 lakhs, PAT INR 17,005 lakhs.
AFL Prime Lending Rate will be cut by 15 bps from March 1, 2026; NCDs have 100% security cover.

news.title:
AAVAS Financiers confirmed timely interest payment on NCDs Series A & B.
Interest payment totaled Rs. 16.88 crore on Jan 16, 2026, per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
AAVAS Financiers confirmed timely interest payment on NCDs Series A & B.
Interest payment totaled Rs. 16.88 crore on Jan 16, 2026, per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Aavas Financiers Ltd informed about its statutory auditor's conversion to LLP.
M S K A & Associates is now M S K A & Associates LLP; audit engagement remains unchanged.
news.summary:
Aavas Financiers Ltd informed about its statutory auditor's conversion to LLP.
M S K A & Associates is now M S K A & Associates LLP; audit engagement remains unchanged.

news.title:
Aavas Financiers executed a Rs. 284.4 crore NSE block trade for ~1,964,150 shares.
The trade was priced at Rs. 1,447.8 per share.
news.summary:
Aavas Financiers executed a Rs. 284.4 crore NSE block trade for ~1,964,150 shares.
The trade was priced at Rs. 1,447.8 per share.

news.title:
Aavas Financiers approves issuance of ₹975 cr unlisted secured NCDs in two tranches.
The NCDs are to be issued to a multilateral institution.
news.summary:
Aavas Financiers approves issuance of ₹975 cr unlisted secured NCDs in two tranches.
The NCDs are to be issued to a multilateral institution.

news.title:
AAVAS Financiers Ltd schedules a physical group meeting with analysts on Dec 23, 2025, in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared; investor presentation is on www.aavas.in.
news.summary:
AAVAS Financiers Ltd schedules a physical group meeting with analysts on Dec 23, 2025, in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared; investor presentation is on www.aavas.in.

news.title:
Aavas Financiers Ltd to hold investor/analyst meetings on Dec 9, 11, and 12, 2025 in Mumbai.
Meetings will be one-on-one, using only publicly available information; no unpublished data shared.
news.summary:
Aavas Financiers Ltd to hold investor/analyst meetings on Dec 9, 11, and 12, 2025 in Mumbai.
Meetings will be one-on-one, using only publicly available information; no unpublished data shared.

news.title:
Aavas Financiers sees valuation changes affecting price appeal in housing finance.
P/E and P/BV ratios analyzed against historical data and peer benchmarks.
news.summary:
